Growth Hive Full-time

Marketing Manager

apartment Growth Hive
location_on Phnom Penh, KH
currency_exchange $1,200 - $2,000

Job Description

As a Marketing Manager at Growth Hive, you will develop and execute comprehensive marketing strategies across digital channels to grow brand awareness, generate qualified leads, and accelerate revenue growth.

You'll manage a lean, talented marketing team, own campaign performance metrics, and work cross-functionally with sales and product to align messaging with business objectives.

Requirements

  • check_circle 5+ years of marketing experience, preferably B2B.
  • check_circle Proficiency in Google Analytics, Meta Ads, and SEO.
  • check_circle Experience managing and mentoring a small team.
  • check_circle Strong analytical and data-driven mindset.

Interested?

Don't miss this opportunity to advance your career.
